entry.title: IDC 89303320DEM000030 (P00060) awarded to CENTRAL PLATEAU CLEANUP COMPANY LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: FAR 52.216-18 Ordering (Oct 1995) FAR 52.216-22 Indefinite Quantity (Oct 1995) Task Ordering Procedure

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: HANFORD CENTRAL PLATEAU CLEANUP CONTRACT MASTER: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO UPDATE SECTION J, ATTACHMENT J-2, REQUIREMENTS SOURCES AND IMPLEMENTING DOCUMENTS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINTENANCE OF WASTE TREATMENT AND STORAGE FACILITIES
